ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show is re-set to October 18, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
